text.title: Client Handover Package Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes handover by section completeness → secrets transferred → successor named → dual sign-off. Branches name observable artefact features.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: engagement closing, runbook draft + open-items list available?

branch.when: prereqs_met == true AND sections_incomplete == false AND secrets_incomplete == true
prereqs_met == true AND sections_incomplete == false AND secrets_incomplete == false AND successor_team_alias == true
prereqs_met == true AND sections_incomplete == false AND secrets_incomplete == false AND successor_team_alias == false AND signoff_partial == true
prereqs_met == true AND sections_incomplete == false AND secrets_incomplete == false AND successor_team_alias == false AND signoff_partial == false

text.example: prereqs_met=true → 7 sections complete → 1 credential rotated+ack → successor named → dual signoff → verdict=archive-and-close (ref run-the-checklist).
